name: Location Intelligence Agent
short_description: Place discovery, summaries, and review extraction for travel and business research.
description: Location intelligence agent that provides place discovery, summaries, and review extraction for travel and business research.

capabilities.name: location/place_search
capabilities.description: Searches places by keyword and optional city filter with structured result output.

capabilities.name: location/place_summary
capabilities.description: Returns normalized place summary data such as rating, category, address, and opening status.

capabilities.name: location/review_sampling
capabilities.description: Extracts representative review snippets for quick qualitative analysis.

commands.description: Searches places by query with optional city and count parameters. Returns structured results with name, address, rating, and category.
Fetches a detailed summary for a single place including rating, category, address, opening hours, and contact info.
Returns top or most relevant reviews for a place.
Lists all commands, required inputs, and output format notes.
